claim_statement: Tau depends on straton chi; chi = m/c implies tau scales with spacecraft mass.
dataset: DS-005 flyby_real + Pioneer anchors (spacecraft_mass_kg column added)
method: Compare tau=const vs tau=alpha*m using weighted least squares on a_obs_whole_m_s2 vs feature_base_m_s3 with sigma_whole weights; include control rows; bootstrap, leaveout, and shuffle controls.
pass_condition: All prereg gates true: delta_bic <= -10; CV(alpha)<0.30; shuffle collapse; leaveout pass_fraction>=0.90.

decision.note: Delta BIC strongly favors mass-scaling, but leave-10%-out pass_fraction=0.886 and CV(alpha)=0.775 fail prereg gates.
